HelpText:
Set up how you want your retainer to be and click 'Create Retainers'
If you haven't already done the Venture Quest, it will run after creating retainers.

If any task fails or you somehow messed up midway,
you can try to continue through one of the 'Single Backup Tasks'
RetainersLocked: Retainers are not unlocked. Proceed with MSQ and finish "The Scions of the Seventh Dawn".
CantReadMaxRetainers: Could not read the maximum allowed amount of retainers on your account.
InteractWithVocate: Please interact with a "Retainer Vocate" to progress.
CannotCreateMoreRetainers: You can not create more Retainers on this character!
NoGearsetForClass: You have no gearset registered for your chosen class.
